/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic CMakeFiles/rail_kavach_cpp.dir/app/diag_app/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rail_kavach_cpp.dir/bsw/dem/src/DemCore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rail_kavach_cpp.dir/bsw/dem/src/EvtLogger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rail_kavach_cpp.dir/bsw/nvm/src/NvmStorage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rail_kavach_cpp.dir/bsw/kavach/src/KavachEth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rail_kavach_cpp.dir/bsw/kavach/src/KavachConditions.cpp.o -o rail_kavach_cpp
